creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
(In reply to Masachika ISHIZUKA from comment #13)
> [nfs client]
> 14.0-CURRENT n250051(04c91ac48ad) on ufs.
> mount /usr/ports by nfs

% grep /usr/ports /etc/fstab 
XXX.XXX.XXX.XXX:/usr/ports-current  /usr/ports  nfs   rw,noauto,nfsv4,rsize=1048576,wsize=1048576     0       0

autofs enabled.
